label: SI-10(5)
title: Restrict Inputs to Trusted Sources and Approved Formats

prose.en: Restrict the use of information inputs to {param:si-10.05_odp.01} and/or {param:si-10.05_odp.02}.

guidance.en: Restricting the use of inputs to trusted sources and in trusted formats applies the concept of authorized or permitted software to information inputs. Specifying known trusted sources for information inputs and acceptable formats for such inputs can reduce the probability of malicious activity. The information inputs are those defined by the organization in the base control ( SI-10).

prose.en: the use of information inputs is restricted to {param:si-10.05_odp.01} and/or {param:si-10.05_odp.02}.

objects.en: system configuration settings and associated documentation
list of trusted sources for information inputs
list of acceptable formats for input restrictions
Organizational personnel responsible for information input validation
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Organizational processes for restricting information inputs
automated mechanisms supporting and/or implementing restriction of information inputs

guidelines.en: trusted sources to which the use of information inputs is to be restricted are defined;
formats to which the use of information inputs is to be restricted are defined;
